message:
test(config): replace duplicate archive_maintenance tests with boundary + non-numeric coverage (br-ah24m)

Remove 5 tests that duplicated ebe56338's coverage; add 3 new tests:
exact min boundary (60), exact max boundary (86400), and non-numeric
env value fallback to default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
